text: Hi, would you please comment and advise on my semen analysis: pH eight, volume three ml, pus cells one three, red blood cells nil, epithelial cells zero one, color cream white, viscosity mucoid, concentration zero point one x ten s six ml, ideal forms three percent, big head defects, thirty seven percent mid piece defects, thirty percent bid head defects, thirty seven percent mid piece defects, thirty percent pin head defects, thirty seven percent mid piece defects, thirty seven percent mid piece defects, four zero ray defense, non motile eighty percent.
